list items.content: *[lang|="en"] - att value either being exactly "val" or beginning with "val" immediately followed by "-" E[att^="val"] - att value that begins with the preﬁx "val" E[att$="val"] - att value that end with the suﬃx "val" E[att*="val"] - att value contains at least one instance of the substring "val"
